results.rendered_html:
1. āśvina (von aśvin)
1〉 adj.
a〉 Rossen oder Reitern gleichend: pra ta āśvinīḥ pavamāna dhījuvo divyā asṛgranpayasā dharīmaṇi  ṚV. 9,86,4  (vgl. 1).
— b〉 den Aśvin gehörig, geweiht  VS. 24,3 .  AIT. BR. 2,25 .  ŚAT. BR. 4,1,5,1 . 5,3,1,8 . 11,5,3,5 . 5,9 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 12,6,3 . 6 . 7 . 19,3,2 .  ĀŚV. ŚR. 9,2 . āśvinaṃ dhūmralalāmamālabheta  TS. 2,1,10,1 . 6,4,9,1 .
— 2〉 m. N. eines Regenmonats (in dem der Vollmond bei dem Sternbilde Aśvinī steht)  AK. 1,1,3,17 .  H. 155 .  COLEBR. Misc. Ess. I, 186 . 193 .  VP. 225, N. 19 . Vgl. āśvayuja.
— 3〉 f. ˚nī Bez. gewisser Brennziegel (iṣṭakā)  TS. 5,3,1,1 .  ŚAT. BR. 8,2,1,11 . 10,4,3,15 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 17,8,1 . 15 . 11,1 . 12,1 . = aśvimānupadhāno mantra āsām  P. 4,4,126 .

results.rendered_html:
āśvina a. (nī f.)
1 Belonging or sacred to the Aśvins (aśvinau devate asya).
2 Pervading.
— naḥ
1 N. of a month (in which the moon is near ths constellation Aśvinī).
2 A sacrifice or a weapon presided over by the Aśvins.
3 (du.) The Aśvins.
— nī
1 N. of certain bricks.
2 A pile, stack (citibhedaḥ).
— naṃ A day's journey for a horse or rider (Ved.).
